Enumeration Case# kUSBPowerRequestSleepRelease

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.7+

```
kUSBPowerRequestSleepRelease = 3
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/usbpowerrequesttypes/kusbpowerrequestsleeprelease#discussion)

When used with ReturnExtraPower(), it will send a message to all devices to return any sleep power if possible.
